title: chionochloa pallens
intro: Chionochloa pallens, also known as the tussock grass or snow tussock, is a type of grass native to New Zealand. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chionochloa pallens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Chionochloa pallens is often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
